content: react-hook-form useFieldArray is the standard pattern for repeating/growable form rows: const { fields, append, remove } = useFieldArray({ control, name: 'lineItems' }); Zod schema defines an array of objects with z.array(lineItemSchema).min(1) at the top level for submit-time validation; map fields.map((field, index) => ...) using field.id as React key (not index) since useFieldArray auto-generates a stable id per row.
